description: Defines architecture rules for inspection scripts, governance checks, and future rule-engine evolution.

rules.name: Inspection scripts use rule catalogues
rules.description: Inspection scripts should read rule definitions from JSON rule catalogues rather than embedding rule metadata only in code.

rules.name: Entity-specific deviations use overrides
rules.description: Entity-specific CRUD deviations must be represented through ruleOverrides rather than hardcoded exceptions.

rules.name: Disabled rules are reported
rules.description: Disabled rules must produce structured findings explaining that the rule is disabled and why.

rules.name: Console output stays concise
rules.description: Inspection scripts should print one-line terminal summaries and write detailed reports to output folders.

rules.name: Inspection framework evolves toward generic rule evaluation
rules.description: Inspection scripts should move toward reusable rule evaluation infrastructure rather than isolated ad-hoc checks.

rules.name: Inspection scripts must separate rule definitions from rule execution
rules.description: Rule metadata/configuration should remain externalized from rule execution logic so the framework can evolve toward reusable rule engines and DSL-style inspection architectures.
